title: CASH GENERATION AS A % OF BILLINGS (₹ Mn/%)
description: Stacked bar chart of Cash from Operations (before Taxes) as a % of Billings across FY21 to FY25, with Total Billings values shown for each year.

title: DIVIDEND PAID (₹ Mn)
description: Vertical bar chart showing Dividend Paid from FY21 to FY25, with a CAGR label of 39.4%.

title: DIVIDEND PER SHARE & DIVIDEND PAYOUT RATIO (₹/%)
description: Bar chart showing Dividend per Share and Dividend Payout Ratio across FY21 to FY25, with a CAGR label of 39.2%.

title: PERMANENT EMPLOYEE COUNT* (Nos.)
description: Vertical bar chart showing Permanent Employee Count from FY21 to FY25, with a footnote including Zwayam and Doselect employees.

title: STANDALONE BALANCE SHEET
description: Two donut charts comparing FY25 and FY24 composition for Assets and Liabilities, with supporting tables of particulars.

title: CONSOLIDATED BALANCE SHEET
description: Two donut charts comparing FY25 and FY24 composition for Assets and Liabilities, with supporting tables of particulars.
